qa_pairs.question: What types of tasks are displayed in the "Statistiques des tâches" section?
qa_pairs.answer: The "Statistiques des tâches" section displays all tasks a user has launched, including those currently running or pending.

qa_pairs.question: What functionalities are available for filtering, searching, and navigating through tasks in the "Statistiques des tâches" section?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can filter tasks by status (e.g., OOM, completed, running) using options located in the top-left of the interface. A search function in the top-right allows users to search by Job ID or name. Additionally, an option in the bottom-right enables quick navigation between pages by performing multiple jumps.
